author: FenixRise
description: Track custom emojis in text channels and threads, with features for self-reaction counts, leaderboards, and unused/least used emojis.
install_msg:
Thank you for installing EmojiTracker! Type `[p]help EmojiTracker` to see all commands.

DOCUMENTATION: https://github.com/abbyjank/vrt-remixes/blob/main/emojitracker/README.md
short: Track custom emojis in channels and threads.
